name: nanoclaw-vendor-hevy-mcp
description: Vendored hevy-mcp for the Lobby agent. hevy-mcp cannot run via `npx -y`: (1) hevy-mcp >=1.22.0 requires Node >=24 but the agent container is Node 22, so we pin 1.21.0 (last Node-20-compatible release); (2) hevy-mcp lists the @kubb/* codegen toolchain as PRODUCTION deps and the @kubb monorepo is currently in a cross-version-skewed published state where @kubb/plugin-oas@4.37.7 is referenced but never published (404). The overrides below pin the whole @kubb/* family to 4.37.5 (last fully-consistent published set). @kubb/* is build-time-only (OpenAPI codegen) and never imported at runtime, so the pin is safe. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-14-lobby-agent-design.md.
